entities.name: Social accountability
entities.context: Core belief that accountability in digital products works better through social/anthropomorphic channels than standard UI

entities.name: Anthropomorphic friction
entities.context: Named mechanism where AI personas activate social circuits and guilt to drive habit compliance

entities.name: Social reciprocity
entities.context: Human behavioral wiring that makes us respond to social bids from perceived peers

entities.name: Tribal accountability
entities.context: Deep human wiring for accountability within social groups

entities.name: Relational interfaces
entities.context: Proposed design approach for habit-forming apps that leverages social dynamics over frictionless UI

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company where coaching interventions should use social AI channels for higher adherence

entities.name: Standard UI
entities.context: Traditional interface elements (buttons, dashboards, notifications) that carry zero social debt

entities.name: AI channels
entities.context: Anthropomorphized delivery mechanism that activates social circuits like a human peer

entities.name: Coaching interventions
entities.context: Careerspan feature that should be delivered via social AI channels rather than portal/app

relationships.context: Leverages guilt and social obligation wiring to transform reminders into social bids

Anthropomorphic friction is the mechanism that makes social accountability effective in digital products
Design approach that implements anthropomorphic friction principles
